summary: Excellent new transfer with perfect speed/pitch, delivering a clear listening experience despite unknown show details.
review: Both reviewers rave about the source quality, noting that the speed and pitch are spot‑on and that this transfer avoids the common slowdown issues of many older releases. The recording sounds fresh and lively, though no specific comments on the musical performance or setlist were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high (5‑star) reviews praising the transfer’s accuracy and clarity give strong confidence; with no musical commentary, the rating leans on recording excellence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Speed/pitch described as "almost exactly perfect"; reviewers emphasize relief from slowed‑down sources and praise overall clarity of this new transfer.
